semantic.role: Infrastructure Type Definitions module providing stable data contracts for the indexing, audit, and status reporting domains.
responsibilities: Defines TypeScript interfaces representing core data structures for file metadata (FileRecord), file status (FileStatusRecord), commit associations (FileCommitRecord), and audit events (DriftEvent).
Defines data shapes for system usage analytics (UsageSummaryRow, UsageTotals) and rule violation tracking (ViolationRecord).
Defines the aggregate system status snapshot interface (GlobalStatus).
Provides shared type contracts to decouple data producers (e.g., indexers, auditors) from consumers (e.g., CLI, services).
outOfScope: Runtime logic, data validation, or business rules.
Service orchestration, task execution, or engine implementation.
Direct database access or persistence operations.
invariants: Exports only TypeScript interfaces and type definitions.
Serves as a stable contract for cross-cutting data shapes.
Must not contain executable code or side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Decouple system components by providing a centralized, versioned type contract for core data domains.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes to this specific module indicated by the git context; the recent commit focuses on CLI modularization and infra service decoupling.
